docs.title: Advanced Usage
docs.text: Advanced features and optimizations for littledl.

docs.title: Manual Chunk Size
docs.text:
Override automatic chunk sizing for specific use cases:

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    enable_chunking=True,
    chunk_size=8 * 1024 * 1024,  # 8MB chunks
    max_chunks=8,
)

docs.title: Disabling Chunking
docs.text:
For small files or specific scenarios:

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(enable_chunking=False)

docs.title: Multiple Simultaneous Downloads
docs.text:
import asyncio
from littledl import download_file

async def download_multiple(urls: list[str]):
    tasks = [download_file(url) for url in urls]
    return await asyncio.gather(*tasks)

paths = asyncio.run(download_multiple([
    "https://example.com/file1.zip",
    "https://example.com/file2.zip",
    "https://example.com/file3.zip",
]))

docs.title: Custom Headers
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    headers={
        "User-Agent": "MyApp/1.0",
        "Accept": "application/octet-stream",
    }
)

docs.title: Cookie Handling
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    cookies={
        "session_id": "abc123",
    }
)

docs.title: Verify with Custom CA
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    verify_ssl=True,
    ssl_cert="/path/to/ca-bundle.crt",
)

docs.title: Disable SSL Verification (Not Recommended)
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(verify_ssl=False)

docs.title: Stream Processing
docs.text:
Download and process content in chunks without saving to disk:

from littledl import download_file_stream

async for chunk in download_file_stream("https://example.com/large_file.zip"):
    process(chunk)

docs.title: Custom Progress Display
docs.text:
from littledl import download_file_sync

class ProgressTracker:
    def __init__(self, total: int):
        self.total = total
        self.downloaded = 0

    def __call__(self, downloaded: int, total: int, speed: float, eta: int):
        self.downloaded = downloaded
        percent = (downloaded / total) * 100
        print(f"\r{percent:.1f}% | {speed/1024:.1f} KB/s | ETA: {eta}s", end="")

tracker = ProgressTracker(total=1000000)
path = download_file_sync(
    "https://example.com/file.zip",
    progress_callback=tracker,
)

docs.title: Chunk Status Tracking
docs.text:
from littledl import ChunkEvent, download_file_sync

def on_chunk(event: ChunkEvent):
    print(
        f"chunk={event.chunk_index} status={event.status} "
        f"progress={event.progress:.1f}%"
    )

path = download_file_sync(
    "https://example.com/file.zip",
    chunk_callback=on_chunk,
)

docs.title: Buffer Size
docs.text:
Adjust buffer size for your storage:

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    buffer_size=256 * 1024,  # 256KB buffer
)

docs.title: Connection Pooling
docs.text:
Configure connection pool settings:

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    max_connections=32,
    max_keepalive_connections=16,
)

docs.title: API Reference
docs.text: Complete API reference for littledl.

docs.title: download_file_sync
docs.text:
Synchronous file download.

from littledl import download_file_sync

path = download_file_sync(
    url: str,
    save_path: str = ".",
    filename: str | None = None,
    config: DownloadConfig | None = None,
    progress_callback: Callable | None = None,
    chunk_callback: Callable | None = None,
) -> Path

docs.title: download_file
docs.text:
Asynchronous file download.

from littledl import download_file

path = await download_file(
    url: str,
    save_path: str = ".",
    filename: str | None = None,
    config: DownloadConfig | None = None,
    progress_callback: Callable | None = None,
    chunk_callback: Callable | None = None,
) -> Path

docs.title: DownloadConfig
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    enable_chunking: bool = True,
    max_chunks: int = 16,
    chunk_size: int = 4 * 1024 * 1024,
    buffer_size: int = 64 * 1024,
    timeout: float = 300,
    resume: bool = True,
    verify_ssl: bool = True,
    auth: AuthConfig | None = None,
    proxy: ProxyConfig | None = None,
    speed_limit: SpeedLimitConfig | None = None,
    progress_callback: Callable | None = None,
    chunk_callback: Callable | None = None,
)

## Callback Events

### ProgressEvent

```python
ProgressEvent(
    downloaded: int,
    total: int,
    speed: float,
    eta: int,
    progress: float,
    remaining: int,
    timestamp: float,
)

docs.title: ChunkEvent
docs.text:
ChunkEvent(
    chunk_index: int,
    status: str,  # started/downloading/completed/failed
    downloaded: int,
    total: int,
    progress: float,
    speed: float,
    error: str | None,
    timestamp: float,
)

### AuthConfig

```python
from littledl import AuthConfig, AuthType

auth = AuthConfig(
    auth_type: AuthType,
    username: str | None = None,
    password: str | None = None,
    token: str | None = None,
    api_key: str | None = None,
    api_key_header: str | None = None,
)

docs.title: ProxyConfig
docs.text:
from littledl import ProxyConfig, ProxyMode

proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode: ProxyMode = ProxyMode.SYSTEM,
    http_proxy: str | None = None,
    https_proxy: str | None = None,
    socks5_proxy: str | None = None,
)

docs.title: SpeedLimitConfig
docs.text:
from littledl import SpeedLimitConfig, SpeedLimitMode

speed_limit = SpeedLimitConfig(
    enabled: bool = False,
    mode: SpeedLimitMode = SpeedLimitMode.GLOBAL,
    max_speed: int = 0,
)

docs.title: AuthType
docs.text:
• BASIC
  • BEARER
  • DIGEST
  • API_KEY
  • OAUTH2

docs.title: ProxyMode
docs.text:
• SYSTEM - Auto-detect system proxy
  • CUSTOM - Use custom proxy settings
  • NONE - No proxy

docs.title: SpeedLimitMode
docs.text:
• GLOBAL - Limit overall speed
  • PER_CHUNK - Limit per-chunk speed

docs.title: Language Support
docs.text:
from littledl import set_language, get_available_languages

set_language("zh")  # or "en"
print(get_available_languages())  # {'en': 'English', 'zh': '中文'}

docs.title: BufferedFileWriter
docs.text:
High-performance buffered file writer for optimized concurrent download performance.

from littledl import BufferedFileWriter

writer = BufferedFileWriter(
    file_path="/path/to/file.zip",
    mode="wb",
    buffer_size=512 * 1024,  # 512KB buffer
    flush_interval=0.5,      # 500ms auto flush
    max_buffers=16,          # Maximum concurrent buffers
)

await writer.open()
await writer.write_at(offset=0, data=b"chunk data")
await writer.close()

docs.title: DirectFileWriter
docs.text:
Direct file writer (traditional implementation, kept for backward compatibility).

from littledl import DirectFileWriter

writer = DirectFileWriter(file_path="/path/to/file.zip")
await writer.open()
await writer.write_at(offset=0, data=b"chunk data")
await writer.close()

Note: BufferedFileWriter is automatically used in chunked downloads, no manual configuration needed.

docs.title: Authentication
docs.text: How to configure authentication for protected resources.

docs.title: AuthConfig
docs.text: from littledl import AuthConfig, AuthType

docs.title: Basic Authentication
docs.text:
auth = AuthConfig(
    auth_type=AuthType.BASIC,
    username="user",
    password="pass",
)

docs.title: Bearer Token
docs.text:
auth = AuthConfig(
    auth_type=AuthType.BEARER,
    token="your-api-token",
)

docs.title: API Key
docs.text:
auth = AuthConfig(
    auth_type=AuthType.API_KEY,
    api_key="your-api-key",
    api_key_header="X-API-Key",
)

docs.title: Digest Authentication
docs.text:
auth = AuthConfig(
    auth_type=AuthType.DIGEST,
    username="user",
    password="pass",
)

docs.title: OAuth2
docs.text:
auth = AuthConfig(
    auth_type=AuthType.OAUTH2,
    client_id="client-id",
    client_secret="client-secret",
    token_url="https://example.com/oauth/token",
)

docs.title: Using Authentication
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, AuthConfig, AuthType

auth = AuthConfig(
    auth_type=AuthType.BEARER,
    token="your-token",
)

config = DownloadConfig(auth=auth)
path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/protected/file.zip", config=config)

docs.title: Configuration Guide
docs.text: Detailed configuration options for littledl.

docs.title: DownloadConfig
docs.text:
Main configuration class for download operations.

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    enable_chunking=True,
    max_chunks=16,
    chunk_size=4 * 1024 * 1024,  # 4MB
    buffer_size=64 * 1024,        # 64KB
    timeout=300,
    resume=True,
    verify_ssl=True,
)

docs.title: Configuration Options
docs.text: Option Type Default Description enable_chunking bool True Enable multi-threaded chunked download max_chunks int 16 Maximum number of concurrent chunks chunk_size int 4MB Default size for each chunk buffer_size int 64KB Disk write buffer size timeout float 300 Read/write timeout in seconds resume bool True Enable resume support verify_ssl bool True Verify SSL certificates fallback_to_single_on_failure bool True Auto fallback to single-stream mode on chunked failure verify_hash bool False Verify downloaded file hash expected_hash str None Expected hash value hash_algorithm str sha256 Hash algorithm used in verification min_file_size int None Reject files smaller than this size max_file_size int None Reject files larger than this size progress_update_interval float 0.5 Progress callback interval in seconds chunk_callback Callable None Per-chunk status callback during chunked download

docs.title: Proxy Configuration
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, ProxyConfig, ProxyMode

proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode=ProxyMode.CUSTOM,
    http_proxy="http://proxy.example.com:8080",
    https_proxy="https://proxy.example.com:8080",
)

config = DownloadConfig(proxy=proxy)

docs.title: Speed Limiting
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, SpeedLimitConfig, SpeedLimitMode

speed_limit = SpeedLimitConfig(
    enabled=True,
    mode=SpeedLimitMode.GLOBAL,
    max_speed=1024 * 1024,  # 1 MB/s
)

config = DownloadConfig(speed_limit=speed_limit)

docs.title: Progress Callback
docs.text:
progress_callback supports four formats:

  • Legacy positional args: (downloaded, total, speed, eta)
  • Event object: ProgressEvent
  • Dictionary payload: dict
  • Keyword payload: **payload
from littledl import ProgressEvent

def on_progress(downloaded: int, total: int, speed: float, eta: int):
    percent = (downloaded / total) * 100
    print(f"\r{percent:.1f}% | {speed/1024:.1f} KB/s | ETA: {eta}s", end="")

def on_event(event: ProgressEvent):
    print(event.progress, event.remaining)

def on_dict(payload: dict):
    print(payload["downloaded"], payload["speed"])

def on_kwargs(**payload):
    print(payload["eta"])

config = DownloadConfig(progress_callback=on_progress)

docs.title: Chunk Status Callback
docs.text:
chunk_callback is only triggered in chunked mode. It supports the same four callback formats.

from littledl import ChunkEvent

def on_chunk(event: ChunkEvent):
    print(event.chunk_index, event.status, event.progress)

config = DownloadConfig(chunk_callback=on_chunk)

docs.title: Error Handling
docs.text: How littledl handles errors and exceptions.

docs.title: DownloadException
docs.text:
Base exception for all download-related errors.

from littledl import DownloadException

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip")
except DownloadException as e:
    print(f"Download failed: {e}")

docs.title: NetworkError
docs.text:
Network-related errors (connection timeout, DNS failure, etc.).

from littledl import NetworkError

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip")
except NetworkError as e:
    print(f"Network error: {e}")

docs.title: AuthenticationError
docs.text:
Authentication failures.

from littledl import AuthenticationError

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/protected.zip", config=config)
except AuthenticationError as e:
    print(f"Auth failed: {e}")

docs.title: FileExistsError
docs.text:
File already exists and overwrite is set to False.

from littledl import FileExistsError

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip", overwrite=False)
except FileExistsError as e:
    print(f"File exists: {e}")

docs.title: Retry Configuration
docs.text:
Configure automatic retries for failed downloads.

from littledl import DownloadConfig, RetryConfig, RetryMode

retry = RetryConfig(
    enabled=True,
    mode=RetryMode.EXPONENTIAL,
    max_retries=3,
    initial_delay=1.0,
    max_delay=60.0,
)

config = DownloadConfig(retry=retry)

docs.title: URL Validation
docs.text:
Always validate URLs before downloading:

from urllib.parse import urlparse

def validate_url(url: str) -> bool:
    parsed = urlparse(url)
    return parsed.scheme in ('http', 'https')

if not validate_url(url):
    raise ValueError("Invalid URL")

docs.title: File Size Limits
docs.text:
Set maximum file size to prevent excessive downloads:

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    max_file_size=100 * 1024 * 1024,  # 100MB
)

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: A quick start guide to help you get up and running with littledl.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
• Python 3.10 or higher
  • pip or uv package manager

docs.title: Using pip
docs.text: pip install littledl

docs.title: Using uv
docs.text: uv add littledl

docs.title: Synchronous Download
docs.text:
from littledl import download_file_sync

path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip")
print(f"Downloaded to: {path}")

docs.title: Asynchronous Download
docs.text:
import asyncio
from littledl import download_file

async def main():
    path = await download_file(
        "https://example.com/file.zip",
        save_path="./downloads",
        filename="my_file.zip",
    )
    print(f"Downloaded to: {path}")

asyncio.run(main())

docs.title: Next Steps
docs.text:
• Configuration Guide - Learn about all configuration options
  • Authentication - Set up authentication for protected resources
  • API Reference - Detailed API documentation

docs.title: Proxy Configuration
docs.text: Detailed guide on configuring proxy settings for littledl.

docs.title: ProxyConfig
docs.text: from littledl import ProxyConfig, ProxyMode

docs.title: System Proxy (Auto-detect)
docs.text:
Automatically detect and use system proxy settings.

proxy = ProxyConfig(mode=ProxyMode.SYSTEM)

docs.title: Custom Proxy
docs.text:
Manually specify proxy settings.

proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode=ProxyMode.CUSTOM,
    http_proxy="http://proxy.example.com:8080",
    https_proxy="https://proxy.example.com:8080",
)

docs.title: No Proxy
docs.text:
Explicitly disable proxy.

proxy = ProxyConfig(mode=ProxyMode.NONE)

docs.title: SOCKS5 Proxy
docs.text:
proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode=ProxyMode.CUSTOM,
    socks5_proxy="socks5://user:pass@proxy.example.com:1080",
)

docs.title: Using Proxy with DownloadConfig
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, ProxyConfig, ProxyMode

proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode=ProxyMode.CUSTOM,
    http_proxy="http://proxy.example.com:8080",
)

config = DownloadConfig(proxy=proxy)
path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip", config=config)

docs.title: Environment Variables
docs.text:
littledl also respects standard proxy environment variables:

  • HTTP_PROXY / http_proxy
  • HTTPS_PROXY / https_proxy
  • SOCKS_PROXY / socks_proxy
  • NO_PROXY / no_proxy

docs.title: 手动分块大小
docs.text:
为特定用例覆盖自动分块大小：

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    enable_chunking=True,
    chunk_size=8 * 1024 * 1024,  # 8MB 分块
    max_chunks=8,
)

docs.title: 禁用分块
docs.text:
对于小文件或特定场景：

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(enable_chunking=False)

docs.title: 多个同时下载
docs.text:
import asyncio
from littledl import download_file

async def download_multiple(urls: list[str]):
    tasks = [download_file(url) for url in urls]
    return await asyncio.gather(*tasks)

paths = asyncio.run(download_multiple([
    "https://example.com/file1.zip",
    "https://example.com/file2.zip",
    "https://example.com/file3.zip",
]))

docs.title: 流式处理
docs.text:
下载并分块处理内容而不保存到磁盘：

from littledl import download_file_stream

async for chunk in download_file_stream("https://example.com/large_file.zip"):
    process(chunk)

docs.title: 自定义进度显示
docs.text:
from littledl import download_file_sync

class ProgressTracker:
    def __init__(self, total: int):
        self.total = total
        self.downloaded = 0

    def __call__(self, downloaded: int, total: int, speed: float, eta: int):
        self.downloaded = downloaded
        percent = (downloaded / total) * 100
        print(f"\r{percent:.1f}% | {speed/1024:.1f} KB/s | 剩余: {eta}s", end="")

tracker = ProgressTracker(total=1000000)
path = download_file_sync(
    "https://example.com/file.zip",
    progress_callback=tracker,
)

docs.title: 分块状态跟踪
docs.text:
from littledl import ChunkEvent, download_file_sync

def on_chunk(event: ChunkEvent):
    print(
        f"chunk={event.chunk_index} status={event.status} "
        f"progress={event.progress:.1f}%"
    )

path = download_file_sync(
    "https://example.com/file.zip",
    chunk_callback=on_chunk,
)

)

docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    enable_chunking: bool = True,

## 回调事件

### ProgressEvent

```python
ProgressEvent(
    downloaded: int,
    total: int,
    speed: float,
    eta: int,
    progress: float,
    remaining: int,
    timestamp: float,
)

docs.title: ProxyMode
docs.text:
• SYSTEM - 自动检测系统代理
  • CUSTOM - 使用自定义代理设置
  • NONE - 不使用代理

docs.title: SpeedLimitMode
docs.text:
• GLOBAL - 限制整体速度
  • PER_CHUNK - 限制每个分块的速度

docs.title: 多语言支持
docs.text:
from littledl import set_language, get_available_languages

set_language("zh")  # 或 "en"
print(get_available_languages())  # {'en': 'English', 'zh': '中文'}

docs.title: BufferedFileWriter
docs.text:
高性能缓冲文件写入器，用于优化并发下载性能。

from littledl import BufferedFileWriter

writer = BufferedFileWriter(
    file_path="/path/to/file.zip",
    mode="wb",
    buffer_size=512 * 1024,  # 512KB 缓冲
    flush_interval=0.5,      # 500ms 自动刷新
    max_buffers=16,          # 最大并发缓冲数
)

await writer.open()
await writer.write_at(offset=0, data=b"chunk data")
await writer.close()

docs.title: DirectFileWriter
docs.text:
直接文件写入器（传统实现，保留向后兼容）。

from littledl import DirectFileWriter

writer = DirectFileWriter(file_path="/path/to/file.zip")
await writer.open()
await writer.write_at(offset=0, data=b"chunk data")
await writer.close()

注意: BufferedFileWriter 会自动在分块下载中使用，无需手动配置。

docs.title: 认证设置
docs.text: 如何为受保护的资源配置认证。

docs.title: Basic 认证
docs.text:
auth = AuthConfig(
    auth_type=AuthType.BASIC,
    username="user",
    password="pass",
)

docs.title: Digest 认证
docs.text:
auth = AuthConfig(
    auth_type=AuthType.DIGEST,
    username="user",
    password="pass",
)

docs.title: 使用认证
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, AuthConfig, AuthType

auth = AuthConfig(
    auth_type=AuthType.BEARER,
    token="your-token",
)

config = DownloadConfig(auth=auth)
path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/protected/file.zip", config=config)

docs.title: 配置指南
docs.text: littledl 的详细配置选项。

docs.title: DownloadConfig
docs.text:
下载操作的主要配置类。

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    enable_chunking=True,
    max_chunks=16,
    chunk_size=4 * 1024 * 1024,  # 4MB
    buffer_size=64 * 1024,        # 64KB
    timeout=300,
    resume=True,
    verify_ssl=True,
)

docs.title: 配置选项
docs.text: 选项 类型 默认值 说明 enable_chunking bool True 启用多线程分块下载 max_chunks int 16 最大并发分块数 chunk_size int 4MB 每个分块的大小 buffer_size int 64KB 磁盘写入缓冲区大小 timeout float 300 读写超时时间（秒） resume bool True 启用断点续传 verify_ssl bool True 验证 SSL 证书 fallback_to_single_on_failure bool True 分块失败时自动回退到单连接下载 verify_hash bool False 校验下载文件哈希 expected_hash str None 预期哈希值 hash_algorithm str sha256 校验使用的哈希算法 min_file_size int None 拒绝小于该值的文件 max_file_size int None 拒绝大于该值的文件 progress_update_interval float 0.5 回调刷新间隔（秒） chunk_callback Callable None 分块下载过程中的分片状态回调

docs.title: 代理配置
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, ProxyConfig, ProxyMode

proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode=ProxyMode.CUSTOM,
    http_proxy="http://proxy.example.com:8080",
    https_proxy="https://proxy.example.com:8080",
)

config = DownloadConfig(proxy=proxy)

docs.title: 速度限制
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, SpeedLimitConfig, SpeedLimitMode

speed_limit = SpeedLimitConfig(
    enabled=True,
    mode=SpeedLimitMode.GLOBAL,
    max_speed=1024 * 1024,  # 1 MB/s
)

config = DownloadConfig(speed_limit=speed_limit)

docs.title: 进度回调
docs.text:
progress_callback 支持四种格式：

  • 传统位置参数：(downloaded, total, speed, eta)
  • 事件对象：ProgressEvent
  • 字典载荷：dict
  • 关键字参数：**payload
from littledl import ProgressEvent

def on_progress(downloaded: int, total: int, speed: float, eta: int):
    percent = (downloaded / total) * 100
    print(f"\r{percent:.1f}% | {speed/1024:.1f} KB/s | 剩余: {eta}s", end="")

def on_event(event: ProgressEvent):
    print(event.progress, event.remaining)

def on_dict(payload: dict):
    print(payload["downloaded"], payload["speed"])

def on_kwargs(**payload):
    print(payload["eta"])

config = DownloadConfig(progress_callback=on_progress)

docs.title: 分块状态回调
docs.text:
chunk_callback 仅在分块下载模式下触发，支持与 progress_callback 相同的四种格式。

from littledl import ChunkEvent

def on_chunk(event: ChunkEvent):
    print(event.chunk_index, event.status, event.progress)

config = DownloadConfig(chunk_callback=on_chunk)

docs.title: 错误处理
docs.text: littledl 如何处理错误和异常。

docs.title: DownloadException
docs.text:
所有下载相关错误的基础异常。

from littledl import DownloadException

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip")
except DownloadException as e:
    print(f"下载失败: {e}")

docs.title: NetworkError
docs.text:
网络相关错误（连接超时、DNS 失败等）。

from littledl import NetworkError

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip")
except NetworkError as e:
    print(f"网络错误: {e}")

docs.title: AuthenticationError
docs.text:
认证失败。

from littledl import AuthenticationError

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/protected.zip", config=config)
except AuthenticationError as e:
    print(f"认证失败: {e}")

docs.title: FileExistsError
docs.text:
文件已存在且 overwrite 设置为 False。

from littledl import FileExistsError

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip", overwrite=False)
except FileExistsError as e:
    print(f"文件已存在: {e}")

docs.title: 重试配置
docs.text:
为失败的下载配置自动重试。

from littledl import DownloadConfig, RetryConfig, RetryMode

retry = RetryConfig(
    enabled=True,
    mode=RetryMode.EXPONENTIAL,
    max_retries=3,
    initial_delay=1.0,
    max_delay=60.0,
)

config = DownloadConfig(retry=retry)

docs.title: URL 验证
docs.text:
下载前始终验证 URL：

from urllib.parse import urlparse

def validate_url(url: str) -> bool:
    parsed = urlparse(url)
    return parsed.scheme in ('http', 'https')

if not validate_url(url):
    raise ValueError("无效的 URL")

docs.title: 文件大小限制
docs.text:
设置最大文件大小以防止过度下载：

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    max_file_size=100 * 1024 * 1024,  # 100MB
)

docs.title: 快速入门
docs.text: 快速入门指南，帮助您快速上手 littledl。

docs.title: 前置要求
docs.text:
• Python 3.10 或更高版本
  • pip 或 uv 包管理器

docs.title: 使用 pip
docs.text: pip install littledl

docs.title: 使用 uv
docs.text: uv add littledl

docs.title: 同步下载
docs.text:
from littledl import download_file_sync

path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip")
print(f"下载至: {path}")

docs.title: 异步下载
docs.text:
import asyncio
from littledl import download_file

async def main():
    path = await download_file(
        "https://example.com/file.zip",
        save_path="./downloads",
        filename="my_file.zip",
    )
    print(f"下载至: {path}")

asyncio.run(main())

docs.title: 下一步
docs.text:
• 配置指南 - 了解所有配置选项
  • 认证设置 - 为受保护资源设置认证
  • API 参考 - 详细的 API 文档

docs.title: 代理配置
docs.text: littledl 代理配置详细指南。

docs.title: 系统代理（自动检测）
docs.text:
自动检测并使用系统代理设置。

proxy = ProxyConfig(mode=ProxyMode.SYSTEM)

docs.title: 自定义代理
docs.text:
手动指定代理设置。

proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode=ProxyMode.CUSTOM,
    http_proxy="http://proxy.example.com:8080",
    https_proxy="https://proxy.example.com:8080",
)

docs.title: 无代理
docs.text:
显式禁用代理。

proxy = ProxyConfig(mode=ProxyMode.NONE)

docs.title: SOCKS5 代理
docs.text:
proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode=ProxyMode.CUSTOM,
    socks5_proxy="socks5://user:pass@proxy.example.com:1080",
)

docs.title: 在 DownloadConfig 中使用代理
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, ProxyConfig, ProxyMode

proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode=ProxyMode.CUSTOM,
    http_proxy="http://proxy.example.com:8080",
)

config = DownloadConfig(proxy=proxy)
path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip", config=config)

docs.title: 环境变量
docs.text:
littledl 也支持标准代理环境变量：

  • HTTP_PROXY / http_proxy
  • HTTPS_PROXY / https_proxy
  • SOCKS_PROXY / socks_proxy
  • NO_PROXY / no_proxy
